sqlCommands.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,PTF,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select '[batchID]-data5' as KeyID, '5990' as Co,'USD' as Crcy,GL,'7URCAANTP0' as PC,PTF,round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt2, round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL in ('5600000','5600001') and not PTF in ('U3025','U3030','U3035','U3040','U3145','U3146','U3170')  group by GL,PTF)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Yr,Flex1,Flex5,Flex6,Period,Flex2,Flex9,Qtr,Amt1) (select '[batchID]' as KeyID,Descr,Field1,Field2,Field3,Descr,Field1,'y' as Flex9,13 as Qtr,0 as Amt1 from Misc_Tables where Table_ID = 'Sched Y' and ID = 'Names')
insert into TransX (KeyID,Flex1,Flex2) (Select '[batchID]',Stat,Descr from StatusRSG)

update TransX set Amt4 = (case when GL < '4000000' then round(-Amt1,2) else Amt1 end) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not (Co >= '2001' and Co <= '2008' and TP >= '2200' and TP <= '2450' and not TP = '2210')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,CC,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,CCcat,Flex3,Flex4,Flex1,Flex2,Location) (select '[batchID]-data4' as KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,CC,Amt1 * (Rate1 - Rate2) * Rate3,Amt2 * (Rate1 - Rate2) * Rate3,Amt3 * (Rate1 - Rate2) * Rate3,CCcat, 'Y' as Deferrable_Flag, 'N' as Attributable_Flag, Flex1, Flex2,Location from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and Rate1 > Rate2)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,PTF,ProdCode,TTY,Txt,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co,Crcy,'2150000' as GL,PC,'' as PTF,'U1804' as ProdCode,'602' as TTY,'Exp reclass [yyyy-mm-dd] 5600000 roll' as Txt,round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2, round(-sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '5600000' group by Co,Crcy,PC)
update TransX set Amt1 = round(Amt1,0) from TransX t inner join Crcy c on t.Crcy = c.Crcy where KeyID = '[batchID]' and c.DecimalPlaces = 0

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,PTF,ProdCode,TTY,Txt,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co,Crcy,'2150001' as GL,PC,'' as PTF,'U1801' as ProdCode,'824' as TTY,'Exp reclass [yyyy-mm-dd] 5600062 roll' as Txt,round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2, round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '5600062' group by Co,Crcy,PC)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,PTF,ProdCode,TTY,Txt,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co,Crcy,'2150001' as GL,PC,'' as PTF,'U1801' as ProdCode,'603' as TTY,'Exp reclass [yyyy-mm-dd] 5600062 roll' as Txt,round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2, round(-sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '5600062' group by Co,Crcy,PC)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,PTF,ProdCode,TTY,Txt,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co,Crcy,'2150001' as GL,PC,'' as PTF,'U1801' as ProdCode,'612' as TTY,'Exp reclass [yyyy-mm-dd] 5600001 roll' as Txt,round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2, round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '5600001' group by Co,Crcy,PC)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,PTF,ProdCode,TTY,Txt,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co,Crcy,'2150001' as GL,PC,'' as PTF,'U1801' as ProdCode,'610' as TTY,'Exp reclass [yyyy-mm-dd] 5600001 roll' as Txt,round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2, round(-sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '5600001' group by Co,Crcy,PC)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,PTF,ProdCode,TTY,Txt,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co,Crcy,'2150000' as GL,PC,'' as PTF,'U1804' as ProdCode,'607' as TTY,'Exp reclass [yyyy-mm-dd] 5600000 roll' as Txt,round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2, round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '5600000' group by Co,Crcy,PC)
update TransX set  BusCat = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'

update TransX set Flex1 = n.Field1, Flex3 = m.Field1, Qtr = m.Field2, Yr = m.Field3 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.GL = m.Descr and m.Table_ID = 'Sched Y' and m.ID = 'GL2' inner join Misc_Tables n on m.Field3 = n.Descr and n.Table_ID = 'Sched Y' and n.ID = 'Names' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Amt8 = (select round(sum(Amt3),2) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data5' and GL = '5600001') where KeyID = '[batchID]-data5' and GL = '5600001'
update TransX set Amt7 = Amt7 + (select round(sum(Amt3),2) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '5600000') where KeyID = '[batchID]-data5' and GL = '5600001'
update TransX set Amt6 = round(Amt3 / Amt8 * Amt7,2) where KeyID = '[batchID]-data5'
insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,PTF,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,PTF,Amt6, Amt6,Amt6 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data5')
insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,GL,PTF,Amt3) (select '[batchID]-data8' as KeyID, Co,GL,PTF,round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co,GL,PTF)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, PTF, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2 , round(-Amt3,2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data7')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,TP,Amt2,Amt3,Flex1,Yr,Qtr,Flex2,Period,Flex7,Flex8,Flex9,Flex4) (select KeyID,TP,Co,Amt3,Amt2,Flex2,Period,Qtr,Flex1,Yr,Flex8,Flex7, 'n' as Flex9, (case when Flex4 = 'A' then 'C' else 'A' end) as Flex4 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co >= '2200' and Co <= '2450' and TP >= '2001' and TP <= '2008' )
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
update TransX set BusCat = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Name from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set TPname = p.Name, Flex1 = p.SchedYname, Yr = p.SchedYrow, Flex5 = p.NAIC, Flex6 = p.FedID, Flex7 = p.OneStreamID from TransX t inner join TPs p on t.TP = p.TP where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex2 = p.SchedYname, Period = p.SchedYrow, Flex8 = p.OneStreamID from TransX t inner join TPs p on t.Co = p.TP where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex4 = (case when BusCat >= '10' and BusCat <= '29' then 'A' else 'C' end) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex3 = m.Field1, Qtr = m.Field2 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on substring(t.GL,1,3) = m.Descr where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'Sched Y' and ID = 'GL'
update TransX set Amt3 = round(0-Amt2,2) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, Gldesc, Co, Flex1, Flex4, Flex9, Qtr, Amt2, Amt3) (select KeyID, '4000000' as GL, 'Colm 9' as GLdesc, Co, SchedYname, Flex4, 'n' as Flex9, 9 as Qtr, round(-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2, round(-sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX t inner join TPs p on t.Co = p.TP where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Qtr = 9 group by KeyID,Co,SchedYname,Flex4)
update TransX set Flex5 = m.Field2, Flex6 = m.Field3 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on Yr = m.Descr where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'Sched Y' and ID = 'Names'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and co = '2999x'

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, Gldesc, Co, Flex1, Flex4, Flex9, Qtr, Amt2, Amt3) (select KeyID, '1000000' as GL, 'Colm 13' as GLdesc, Co, SchedYname, Flex4, 'n' as Flex9, 13 as Qtr,round(-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2,round(-sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX t inner join TPs p on t.Co = p.TP where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Qtr = 13 group by KeyID,Co,SchedYname,Flex4)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Yr,Flex1,Flex5,Flex6,Period,Flex2,Flex9,Qtr,Amt1) (select '[batchID]' as KeyID,Descr,Field1,Field2,Field3,Descr,Field1,'y' as Flex9, 9 as Qtr, 0 as Amt1 from Misc_Tables where Table_ID = 'Sched Y' and ID = 'Names')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
update TransX set SubProd = 'G28', Flex1 = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex2 = p.Descr from TransX t inner join PTFs p on t.PTF = p.PTF where KeyID in ('[batchID]','[batchID]-data8')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,CC,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,CCcat,Flex3,Flex4,Flex1,Flex2,Location) (select '[batchID]-data4' as KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,CC,Amt1 * (Rate2 - Rate1) * Rate3,Amt2 * (Rate2 - Rate1) * Rate3,Amt3 * (Rate2 - Rate1) * Rate3,CCcat, 'N' as Deferrable_Flag, 'Y' as Attributable_Flag, Flex1, Flex2,Location from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and Rate1 < Rate2)
Update TransX set Flex6 = 'U3330' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data4' and Flex6 = 'U3250' and Flex5 = '5620000'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data4' and substring(CC,4,1) in ('I','E') and not Flex6 in (Select Descr from Misc_Tables where Table_ID = 'IR17' and ID = 'UD3 recons')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data4' and substring(CC,4,1) in ('I','E') and coalesce(Flex6,'') = ''
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,CC,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,CCcat,Flex3,Flex4,Flex1,Flex2,Location,Flex5,Flex6) (select KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,CC,-Amt1,-Amt2,-Amt3,CCcat,Flex3,Flex4,Flex1,Flex2,Location, Flex5, 'U3330' as Flex6 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data4' and substring(CC,4,1) in ('I','E'))
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set Amt1 = Amt1/100, Amt2 = Amt2/100, Amt3 = Amt3/100 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data4'
insert into TransX (KeyID, Flex1, Flex2) (Select '[batchID]-data2' as KeyID, Field1 as Flex1, Descr as Flex2 from Misc_Tables where Table_ID = 'IR17' and ID = 'SubPro')
update TransX set Amt8 = (select round(sum(Amt3),2) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data5' and GL = '5600000') where KeyID = '[batchID]-data5' and GL = '5600000'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,PTF,ProdCode,TTY,Txt, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,PTF,ProdCode,TTY,Txt, (case when Amt1 > 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt2 > 0 then Amt2 else 0 end) as Amt2, (case when Amt3 > 0 then Amt3 else 0 end) as Amt3, '40' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '1')
Update TransX set Flex5 = '00 BBal' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
update TransX set Amt2 = 0, Amt3 = 0, Flex9 = 'n', Yr = 999, Period = 999 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Amt4,Flex1,Yr,Qtr,Flex2,Period,Flex7,Flex8,Flex9) (select KeyID,round(0-Amt4,2) as Amt4,Flex2,Period,Qtr,Flex1,Yr,Flex8,Flex7, 'z' as Flex9 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not GL in ('1000000','4000000') )

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,CC,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,CCcat,Flex3,Flex4,Flex1,Flex2,Location) (select '[batchID]-data4' as KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,CC,Amt1 * Rate2 * Rate3,Amt2 * Rate2 * Rate3,Amt3 * Rate2 * Rate3,CCcat, 'Y' as Deferrable_Flag, 'Y' as Attributable_Flag, Flex1, Flex2,Location from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and Rate1 > Rate2)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data4' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0

insert into TransX (KeyID, Zone, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, CC, PTF, SubProd, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select '[batchID]-data6' as KeyID, '3' as Zone, '5990' as Co, '2851017' as GL, 'USD' as Crcy, '7URCAANTP0' as PC, '' as CC, '' as PTF, 'ND' as SubProd, round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt2 , round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Zone = 3)
update TransX set  BusCat = '20' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat like '2%'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex2 is NULL

update TransX set Amt2 = (case when GL < 4000000 or substring(GL,1,2) = '42' then round(0-Amt1,2) else Amt1 end) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not (Co >= '2001' and Co <= '2008' and TP >= '2001' and TP <= '2450' and not TP = '2210')
update TransX set Flex5 = '01 IFRS-4'  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co < '5990' and Flex5 = ''
update TransX set  BusCat = '30' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat like '3%'
update TransX set SubProd = 'TX' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and SubProd = '' and Co like '9%'
update TransX set SubProd = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Co like '9%'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, SubProd, Amt1, Flex2, Flex5) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat,SubProd, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, 'missing' as Flex2, Flex5 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, SubProd, Flex5)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and Zone = '3'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Zone = '3' and PTF in ('U3455','U3460')
update TransX set Amt1 = coalesce(Amt1,0), Amt2 = coalesce(Amt2,0), Amt3 = coalesce(Amt3,0) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,CC,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,CCcat,Flex3,Flex4,Flex1,Flex2,Location) (select '[batchID]-data4' as KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,CC,Amt1 * (100-Rate2) * Rate3,Amt2 * (100-Rate2) * Rate3,Amt3 * (100-Rate2) * Rate3,CCcat, 'N' as Deferrable_Flag, 'N' as Attributable_Flag, Flex1, Flex2,Location from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and Rate1 < Rate2)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,CC,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,CCcat,Rate1,Rate2,Rate3,Flex1,Flex2,Location) (select '[batchID]-data3' as KeyID, t.Co,t.Crcy,t.GL,t.PC,t.CC,t.Amt1,t.Amt2,t.Amt3,c.Cat_Override as CCcat, c.Deferrable * 100 as Rate1, c.Attributable * 100 as Rate2, c.Amt1 as Rate3, c.Co as Flex1, c.Portfolio_Nbr, c.Portfolio_PC as Flex2 from TransX t inner join IR17_CC c on t.CC = c.CC and t.GL = c.GL and c.Typ = 'CC_PC_GL' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Zone in ('1','2'))

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,PTF,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Flex1 as Co,Crcy,Flex5 as GL,Location as PC,Flex6 as PTF,round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2, round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data4' group by Flex1,Crcy,Flex5,Location,Flex6)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,PTF,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Txt) (select KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,PTF,round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2, round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, 'Exp reclass [yyyy-mm-dd]' as Txt from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,PTF)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Txt is NULL

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,PTF,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Txt) (select KeyID, Co,Crcy,'2851017' as GL,'7URCAANTP0' as PC,'' as PTF,round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(-Amt2),2) as Amt2, round(sum(-Amt3),2) as Amt3, 'Exp reclass [yyyy-mm-dd]' as Txt from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co,Crcy)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,PTF,ProdCode,TTY,Txt, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,PK) (Select KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,PTF,ProdCode,TTY,Txt, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, '1' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL group by KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,PTF,ProdCode,TTY,Txt)
update TransX set Amt7 = (select round(sum(Amt3),2) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data6' and  Zone = '5') where KeyID = '[batchID]-data5' and GL = '5600000'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Zone, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, CC, PTF, SubProd, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select '[batchID]-data2' as KeyID, Zone, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, CC, PTF, SubProd, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and Zone in ('4','5')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Zone, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, CC, PTF, SubProd, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,Flex1) (Select KeyID, Zone, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, CC, PTF, SubProd, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, '' as Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Zone, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, CC, PTF, SubProd)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 is NULL

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, PTF, SubProd, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select '[batchID]-data7' as KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, PTF, SubProd, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Zone = '6'  and not PTF = 'U3460' and not SubProd = 'TPA' group by Co, GL, Crcy, PC, PTF, SubProd)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,CC,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,CCcat,Rate1,Rate2,Rate3,Flex1,Flex2,Location) (select '[batchID]-data3' as KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,CC,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,substring(CC,4,1) as CCcat, 0 as Rate1, 100 as Rate2, 1 as Rate3, '5990' as Flex1, '1' as Location, '7URCAANTP0' as Flex2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Zone in ('1','2') and substring(CC,4,1) in ('I','E'))

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,CC,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,CCcat,Flex3,Flex4,Flex1,Flex2,Location) (select '[batchID]-data4' as KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,CC,Amt1 * Rate1 * Rate3,Amt2 * Rate1 * Rate3,Amt3 * Rate1 * Rate3,CCcat, 'Y' as Deferrable_Flag, 'Y' as Attributable_Flag, Flex1, Flex2,Location from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and Rate1 <= Rate2)
Update TransX set Flex5 = '5600000' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data4' and Flex3 = 'Y' and Flex4 = 'Y' and CCcat in ('U','S','A','I','E')
Update TransX set Flex5 = '5600062' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data4' and Flex4 = 'Y' and CCcat in ('C','H')
Update TransX set Flex5 = '5620000' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data4' and Flex4 = 'N'
Update TransX set Flex5 = '5600001' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data4' and Flex3 = 'N' and Flex4 = 'Y' and CCcat in ('U','S','A','I','E')

Update t set Flex6 = m.UD3 from TransX t inner join osAccountMap3 m on t.GL >= m.GL_From and t.GL <= m.GL_Thru and m.Co_Thru = '9999' and m.TTY = '' and m.TP_From = '' and m.BC_From = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]-data4'
Update TransX set Flex6 = 'U3451' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data4' and GL = '6420000'
update TransX set Amt7 = Amt7 - (select round(sum(Amt3),2) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '5600000') where KeyID = '[batchID]-data5' and GL = '5600000'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,PTF,ProdCode,TTY,Txt, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,PTF,ProdCode,TTY,Txt, (case when Amt1 < 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt2 < 0 then Amt2 else 0 end) as Amt2, (case when Amt3 < 0 then Amt3 else 0 end) as Amt3, '50' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '1')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
select SYSDATETIME()
update TransX set Flex5 = '02 G31 Rev'  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and SubProd = 'G23' and Flex5 = ''
update TransX set Flex5 = '03 ' + SubProd  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and SubProd in ('RI','RI FX') and Flex5 = ''
update TransX set Flex5 = '04 G32 Load'  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and SubProd = 'G26' and Flex5 = ''
update TransX set Flex5 = '05 ' + SubProd  where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex5 = ''
insert into TransX (KeyID,Yr,Flex1) (select '[batchID]-data3',Field1,Descr from Misc_Tables where Table_ID = 'Review Notes' and ID = 'M25')
update TransX set  BusCat = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not substring(GL,1,1) in ('4','5') and not substring(GL,1,3) in ('283','284')
update TransX set  BusCat = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,2) in ('46','56')
update t set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'

update t set Flex2 = m.MapKey from TransX t inner join MapKeyRanges m on t.GL >= m.FromGL and t.GL <= m.ThruGL and m.MapKey like 'M1-%' and len(mapkey) > 5 and len(mapkey) < 8 where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update t set Flex3 = m.Name from TransX t inner join MapKeys m on t.Flex2 = m.MapKey where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update t set Flex4 = substring(t.Flex2,4,1) + ') ' + m.Name from TransX t inner join MapKeys m on substring(t.Flex2,1,4) = m.MapKey where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex2 = substring(Flex2,6,2) + ') ' + Flex3 where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex3 = GL + ' ' + GLdesc where KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, TTY, TP, BusCat, SubProd, Amt1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, Flex5, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, TTY, TP, BusCat, SubProd, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, Flex5, '1' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, TTY, TP, BusCat, SubProd, Flex2, Flex3, Flex4, Flex5)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Zone, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, CC, PTF, SubProd, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select '[batchID]-data6' as KeyID, Zone, '5990' as Co, '2150000' as GL, 'USD' as Crcy, '7URCAANTP0' as PC, '' as CC, '' as PTF, 'RI' as SubProd, round(-sum(Amt3),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(Amt3),2) as Amt2 , round(-sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Zone in ('4','5') group by Zone)
Update TransX set Flex6 = 'U3250' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data4' and Flex6 = 'U3330' and GL in ('6913001','6913003','6913004')
update TransX set Amt7 = (select round(sum(Amt3),2) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data6' and Zone in ('3','4')) where KeyID = '[batchID]-data5' and GL = '5600001'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (not PK in ('40','50') or PK is NULL)
insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, SubProd, Amt1, Flex5) (Select KeyID,Co, GL, TTY, TP, BusCat, SubProd, Amt2, '' as Flex5 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Zone = '6'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,CC,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,CCcat,Flex3,Flex4,Flex1,Flex2,Location) (select '[batchID]-data4' as KeyID, Co,Crcy,GL,PC,CC,Amt1 * (100-Rate1) * Rate3,Amt2 * (100-Rate1) * Rate3,Amt3 * (100-Rate1) * Rate3,CCcat, 'N' as Deferrable_Flag, 'N' as Attributable_Flag, Flex1, Flex2,Location from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data3' and Rate1 >= Rate2)
